description.unified: Causes an electric explosion ahead, dealing ??? M.DMG to enemies in range and placing an electric field for [4 sec->3 sec]. The electric field deals a total of ??? M.DMG over 10 attacks and with 25% chance, stuns the enemy for [0.3 sec->0.5 sec].

For 10 sec, ATK is increased by ??? and all DEF is increased by ???. While the skill is in use, each auto attack has a 30% chance of dealing extra ??? M.DMG to 2 random enemies and stunning them for 0.5 sec.
Deals a total of ??? M.DMG over 3 attacks to nearby enemies in a circular range. Then causes an Electric Explosion, dealing a total of ??? M.DMG over 3 attacks and stunning them for [3 sec->5 sec].

With every attack, injects Electricity to targets not inflicted by Shock and increases M.DMG taken by 1% for 10 sec. Electricity can be stacked up to 30 times, and the 30th stack will consume all Electricity to deal ??? M.DMG and Shock the target for [5 sec->7 sec]. Enemies inflicted by Shock take [40%->70%] increased M.DMG, and when they are inflicted by Stun, the duration is increased by 0.7 sec.

dark.unified: Additional DMG effect applies to all enemies.

light.unified: While in use, gain immunity to CC.

dark.unified: Stun duration is increased by [1.2 sec->2 sec].

light.unified: Shock duration is increased by [1.5 sec->2 sec].

description.unified: [Lightning Strike!] Extends the duration of electric field by [2 sec->1 sec], and upon each hit, increases own ATK Spd by [M.DEF->{0}] for 5 sec. This effect can be stacked up to max [10->30] times.
[Power of Lightning!] Changes the effect irremovable and increases the chance to trigger an additional damage by {0}% additionally.
[Electric Explosion!] When attacking enemy inflicted by Shock, the enemy takes 100% of ATK as extra M.DMG and target's M.DEF and P.DEF is reduced by {0}% for 5 sec.
[Shock] Enemies under [Shock] take [60%->100%] increased M.DMG, and normal attacks have {0}% chance to inflict 1 stack of Electricity to the enemy. This effect also applies to enemies under [Shock].
Shock duration is increased by {0} sec. When auto attacking an enemy inflicted by Shock, all cooldowns are reduced by {1}%.

Summons the Soul of Eye of the Storm, Yanadis, and deals ??? M.DMG to enemies in a wide frontal range and stuns them for 3 sec. Afterward, places [Raging Magnetic Field] for 6 sec. Enemies within the [Raging Magnetic Field] take [(added) 30%] increased M.DMG, and the duration of all CC effects the enemies take increases by 30%.

1.from: Increases the duration of [Raging Magnetic Field] by 3 sec.
1.to: Increases the duration of Raging Magnetic Field by 3 sec.
1.unified: Increases the duration of Raging Magnetic Field by 3 sec.

2.from: Deals 25% of ATK + 3% of Sonia’s Max HP as M.DMG to enemies within [Raging Magnetic Field] every 1 sec.
2.to: Deals M.DMG equal to 3% of Sonia's Max HP every sec to enemies within Raging Magnetic Field.
2.unified: Deals M.DMG equal to 3% of Sonia's Max HP every sec to enemies within Raging Magnetic Field.
